resume_profile.name: ALEX TAN MING WEI
resume_profile.summary: Systems-oriented RTIS graduate with hands-on experience building real-time simulation systems, REST APIs, and containerised infrastructure tools.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Real-Time Interactive Simulation (RTIS)

projects.title: Distributed Task Scheduler
bullets: Designed a Python-based distributed task scheduler using Redis and Docker that reduced job processing time by 40%, handling 500+ concurrent tasks.
Implemented RESTful APIs with FastAPI and deployed on AWS ECS using Terraform, achieving 99.9% uptime over a 3-month period.
Automated CI/CD pipeline with GitHub Actions, cutting deployment time from 30 minutes to under 5 minutes.

projects.title: Real-Time Physics Engine
bullets: Built a real-time application loop in C++ with Vulkan rendering that sustained 60 fps on 500+ dynamic objects simultaneously.
Implemented spatial algorithms (AABB broad-phase, SAT narrow-phase) in C++, reducing collision computation time by 35%.
Deployed cross-platform on Windows and Linux using CMake.

projects.title: Linux Monitoring Dashboard
bullets: Developed a Prometheus + Grafana monitoring stack with Bash automation scripts that detected system anomalies 3x faster than manual log review.
Containerised the stack with Docker Compose; integrated Kubernetes Helm charts for scaling across 10-node clusters.

experience.title: Systems Engineering Intern
bullets: Automated infrastructure provisioning with Terraform and Ansible across AWS GCP environments, reducing manual setup time by 60%.
Wrote Python scripts to parse and validate Kubernetes pod logs, enabling the team to resolve incidents 50% faster.

jd_profile.experience_level: 1–2 years of experience in digital marketing or a related field
required_skills: Proficiency in Google Ads and Meta Ads Manager
Experience with email marketing platforms (Mailchimp, Klaviyo, or similar)
Analytical mindset: comfortable reading performance dashboards
preferred_skills: Experience with A/B testing and conversion rate optimisation
Knowledge of customer segmentation and lifecycle marketing
Graphic design skills (Canva, Figma, or Adobe suite)
responsibilities: Plan and execute multi-channel digital marketing campaigns (Google Ads, Meta, TikTok, email)
Manage social media content calendars and community engagement
Analyse campaign performance using Google Analytics and Meta Business Suite
Write copy for email newsletters, landing pages, and social media posts
Coordinate with the creative team for campaign assets
Report on KPIs: CAC, ROAS, CTR, conversion rate, retention

bullets.bullet_text: Designed a Python-based distributed task scheduler using Redis and Docker that reduced job processing time by 40%, handling 500+ concurrent tasks.
Implemented RESTful APIs with FastAPI and deployed on AWS ECS using Terraform, achieving 99.9% uptime over a 3-month period.
Automated CI/CD pipeline with GitHub Actions, cutting deployment time from 30 minutes to under 5 minutes.
Built a real-time application loop in C++ with Vulkan rendering that sustained 60 fps on 500+ dynamic objects simultaneously.
Implemented spatial algorithms (AABB broad-phase, SAT narrow-phase) in C++, reducing collision computation time by 35%.
Deployed cross-platform on Windows and Linux using CMake.
Developed a Prometheus + Grafana monitoring stack with Bash automation scripts that detected system anomalies 3x faster than manual log review.
Containerised the stack with Docker Compose; integrated Kubernetes Helm charts for scaling across 10-node clusters.
Automated infrastructure provisioning with Terraform and Ansible across AWS GCP environments, reducing manual setup time by 60%.
Wrote Python scripts to parse and validate Kubernetes pod logs, enabling the team to resolve incidents 50% faster.

ats_red_flags.evidence: Project dates (e.g., Aug 2025 ? Dec 2025) are listed in the future relative to the assumed current date.

background_fit.candidate_background_summary: The candidate is a systems-oriented graduate with experience in building real-time simulation systems, REST APIs, and containerized infrastructure.
background_fit.role_requirements_summary: The role requires a Marketing Specialist focused on planning and executing multi-channel digital campaigns, managing social media content, and analyzing performance KPIs like ROAS and CTR.
background_fit.alignment_commentary: There is very little functional alignment between the candidate's technical systems engineering background and the requirements of a digital marketing specialist role. The candidate lacks demonstrated experience or skills in paid advertising platforms (Google Ads, Meta Ads), copywriting, email marketing, or graphic design tools required for this position.
